title: DTDA Shield Saw
description: Replaces the shield with the DOOM: The Dark Ages shield saw. Also changes skin when renamed.
body:
A visual replacement for the regular shield with the shield saw from DOOM: The Dark Ages with no mods needed. The skin will change when renaming the shield to the name of the skin:
- Divinity
- Quakecon
- Perfection
- Nightmare
- Void
- Butcher
- Reverent
- Conqueror
- Verdant
- Guardian
- Ranger
- Onyx
- Executioner
- Legionary
- Phalanx

There is also 2 custom easter egg skins to discover. (There are hints in the patch notes if you need them)

\
\
In versions 1 and 2, the skin is changed by applying a banner of a specific colour:
- None/Green: Default
- White: Divinity
- Cyan: Quakecon 2025
- Blue: Perfection
- Grey: Nightmare
- Black: Void
- Red: Butcher
- Light Grey: Reverent
- Yellow: Conqueror
- Lime: Verdant
- Purple: Guardian
- Orange: Ranger
- Magenta: Onyx
- Light Blue: Executioner
- Brown: Legionary
